nodes.name: Schedule (Fri 16:00)
nodes.notes: Weekly, end-of-week deal review. Same spine as the exec brief; only the source (HubSpot) and the framing (decisions, not shipped features) change.

nodes.name: HubSpot: deals
nodes.notes: PRIMARY source. Native HubSpot. Latest 50 deals; add a hs_lastmodifieddate 'after' filter to scope to deals that MOVED this week (that's where the decisions are). Set $env.HUBSPOT_PORTAL_ID so build-activity.js can build clickable deal URLs.

nodes.name: Slack: #deals
nodes.notes: STUB (disabled) — context for the 'why'. To enable: add the Slack OAuth2 credential, set $env.SLACK_DEALS_CHANNEL_ID, enable, and connect into 'Build activity'. Permalinks use the shared $env.SLACK_WORKSPACE + $env.SLACK_CHANNEL_ID (see workflow/README).

nodes.name: Notion: deal notes
nodes.notes: STUB (disabled). Deal notes / account pages. To enable: add the Notion credential, share the DB with the integration, set $env.NOTION_DEALS_DATABASE_ID, enable, and connect into 'Build activity'.

nodes.name: Calendar: meetings
nodes.notes: STUB (disabled). Customer meetings that drove a decision. To enable: add the credential, set $env.GCAL_ID, enable, and connect into 'Build activity' (mapper already handles events).

nodes.name: Build activity
nodes.notes: Reused verbatim from the exec brief — normalization is source-agnostic. A deal/Slack/Notion item just joins the citable pool.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.ANTHROPIC_MODEL || 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 1800, system: 'See workflow/README.md (Deal decision-log) for the full system prompt: produce STRICT JSON matching the Brief schema (sections[].bullets[] with text, whyItMatters, citations). text = the DECISION on a deal; whyItMatters = the rationale or next step; every bullet must cite the deal id or url it rests on. Sections by movement (Advanced / Won / Lost / At risk). Never invent an amount, %, or multiplier that is not in a cited artifact label.', messages: [ { role: 'user', content: 'Deal activity (only cite these):\n' + JSON.stringify($json.activity) } ] }) }}

nodes.name: Trust gate
nodes.notes: Reused verbatim. An ungrounded decision (e.g. a deal id not in the activity) or an invented amount is held, not posted.

parameters.jsCode:
// PASTE workflow/render-decision-log.js here. Returns { channel, text } for #deal-log.
throw new Error('Render decision-log not configured — paste render-decision-log.js');

parameters.text: =Beacon held this week's deal decision-log (gate failed). Reasons: {{ JSON.stringify($json.eval.notes) }}
